response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software engineering experience (over 15 years) with a strong background in cloud-native, distributed systems, and AI-adjacent tooling (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq). However, his resume lacks explicit AI/ML product development or recognized expertise (e.g., publications, patents, or AI-focused roles). His entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is relevant but not directly aligned with cloud/AI platform strategy. Degrees are technical but not AI-focused.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, cloud).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, Node.js).
Entrepreneurial background (GISCollective) demonstrating product ownership and open-source contributions.
concerns: No clear evidence of AI/ML expertise or recognized contributions (e.g., no AI-related publications, patents, or AI-specific roles).
Limited focus on cloud technologies in recent roles (e.g., AWS CDK used but not cloud strategy or platform design).
Master's/PhD in AI-related field is missing; education is technical but not specialized in AI.
